name: Generated Comparative Cohort should have correct criteria in read-only mode

steps.name: Wait for selector getByTestId(/^item-name/).filter({ hasText: '1772803991807 substantiate-e2e' }).first().or(getByTestId('empty-list-message'))
Wait for selector getByTestId(/^item-name/).filter({ hasText: '1772804046020 Comparative Cohort' }).first().or(getByTestId('empty-list-message'))
expect cohort to be generated getByTestId(/level-0$/).filter({ hasText: '1772804046020 Comparative Cohort' }).filter({ has: getByTestId(/^item-generated/) }).first()
Cohort status is Generated locator('#accordion__panel-cohort-summary').getByText('Generated', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeChecked" getByLabel('Allow both new (incident) and prevalent users')
Expect "toBeChecked" getByLabel('Require enrollment on the cohort entry date')
Expect "toBeDisabled" getByLabel('Require enrollment on the cohort entry date')
Expect "not toBeChecked" getByLabel('Require enrollment prior to the cohort entry date')
Expect "toBeChecked" getByLabel('Patients may enter the cohort on a subsequent qualifying event')
Expect "toBeChecked" getByLabel('Exclude patients with exposures from more than one category starting on the cohort entry date itself')
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('heading', { name: 'Summary of Cohort Counts' })
